text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our second summer camp has come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...All that's left is to run in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
I was just thinking, you've really softened up
lately.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What, did you like the cold treatment? I can start
bossing you around if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And my sunglasses and sparkling water. Also
bring long gloves for UV protection.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing making me stand beneath the
scorching sun like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I do ads for sunscreen. Can you imagine the losses
I'd suffer if I get sunburned?
choice_data_list: I'll bring them right away, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm just joking. I'm not that bossy, even at
work.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Felt pretty good to hear you call me "ma'am,"
though. Hahaha.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our second summer camp ends with Gold
City laughing.
